name: Dethklok RPG
description:
CW: This IS Dethklok so there will be themes of violence, possible depictions of death, drug use, and other such themes.

I've always wanted to make an RPG about my favorite boys, and here we are.

You're a new member of Dethklok the famous metal band who is said to have the wealth of a small country, and mysterious ways of making music. In actuality they're just a bunch of manbabies, but hey the pay is off the charts, and the fans.. well that's for you to decide!

Also it now has a Lorebook with help from Mysteras hope you all enjoy!
creator: Sauls_assistant
